questions: What is the four‑legged approach to marketing measurement?
How should we combine methods to read incrementality?
qa.answer: Use a portfolio: (1) Experiments (RCT/geo) for ground truth, (2) MMM for long‑run base and budget allocation, (3) MTA/platform models for operational decisions, and (4) Unified business outcomes/holdout calibration to tie reads together.
implication: Set method roles/owners; build a calibration cadence across methods.
Fund continuous experimentation to anchor MMM and platform reads.
Use marginal ROI from MMM for budget shifts; validate with tests.
